nasb.text: But Paul chose Silas and left, being committed by the brethren to the grace of the Lord.

esv.text: but Paul chose Silas and departed, having been commended by the brothers to the grace of the Lord.

cnv.text: 保羅卻選了西拉，眾弟兄把他交託在主的恩典中之後，他就出發了。

ccb.text: 保罗则选了西拉同行，弟兄姊妹把他们交托在主的恩典中。

csbs.text: 保罗却选了赛拉斯。弟兄们把保罗交托于主的恩典之后，他就出发了。
